reason: Confirms where flow code lives (functions/src/flows/) — only triagePr.ts is touched; no new file needed.
Firestore range query patterns for the new recentTriageLoad helper (where('triagedAt','>',Date) + order + limit). Confirms composite-index conventions and the no-'!=' rule.
v2 syntax, region, no console.log — applies to any new logger calls in the workload helper.
Use firebase-functions structured logger for the new helper's degrade-on-failure paths.
Jest + ts-jest patterns for extending __tests__/triagePr.test.ts and __tests__/onPullRequestOpened.test.ts without touching their mock harness shape.
Before adding a new helper module, search-first habit — confirms whether recentTriageLoad belongs in triagePr.ts or warrants a tools/ extract.
Original triage agent PRD — establishes the scoring contract being modified and the persisted doc schema this task extends.
